title: sarcocephalus undulatus
intro: Sarcocephalus undulatus, also known as the undulated sarcocephalus or the African shrub, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Sarcocephalus undulatus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Sarcocephalus undulatus are typically made into decoctions or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
